Name: Percentage of cases where 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurs at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' relative to 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of variants containing 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' that lead to 'SW-EIC Accept'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of times 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' appears in the same case as 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'
Metric: Number of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' activities for cases where activity 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurrences that are followed by another instance of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Frequency of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' compared to the average frequency of all checklist-related activities (e.g., 'SW-Checklist Completed', 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion')
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Percentage of cases starting with 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' that include 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' before 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of variants in which 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' appears more than once
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' events occurring in cases that eventually reach 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Frequency of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' in cases that undergo multiple revision cycles (i.e., contain both 'RW-' and 'RSW-' prefixed activities)
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of all activity executions in the log that correspond to 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of cases containing 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' to cases containing 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of variants where 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' directly follows 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of times 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurs before any reviewer-related activity (e.g., 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection')
Metric: Number of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases with 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' that exhibit longer total process duration (above median performance value across variants)
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases
